zh.Craigmillar, Edinburgh City, Scotland, U: 英國蘇格蘭艾丁波可萊格米拉
zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Simon Preston I於大約1314年出生在英國蘇格蘭阿爾迪史爾時，他的父親Sir John Preston19歲，母親Joan Capella19歲。他於1339年與Jonet Sinclair在美國伊利諾州庫克米德洛迪安結婚。他們至少是5個兒子的父母。他去世於大約1375年在英國蘇格蘭艾丁波可萊格米拉享年63歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Simon Preston I于大约1314年出生在英国苏格兰阿爾迪史爾时，他的父亲Sir John Preston19岁，母亲Joan Capella19岁。他于1339年与Jonet Sinclair在美国伊利诺伊州庫克米德洛迪安结婚。他们至少是5个儿子的父母。他去世于大约1375年在英国苏格兰艾丁波可萊格米拉享年63岁。

nameMeanings.name: Preston
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: habitational name from one of the many places (most notably one in Lancashire) so called from Old English prēost ‘priest’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’.
occasionally from Middle English prest + son ‘son of the priest’. Priests were forbidden marriage but many produced illegitimate offspring.

variants.name: Presson
meanings: English (Cheshire and Lancashire): variant of   Preston  .
French: occupational name for a presser of wine or oil, from a derivative of presser ‘to press’.

variants.name: Prestwich
meanings: English (Lancashire): habitational name from a place in Lancashire (now Greater Manchester), so called from Old English prēost ‘priest’ + wīc ‘outlying settlement’, or from other places with the same derivation. Variants such as Prestidge, Prestage, etc., parallel the local pronunciation of the Lancashire name. Compare Preston .

nameMeanings.name: Simon
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Usual English form of Simeon , borne in the New Testament by various characters: two apostles, a brother of Jesus, a Pharisee, a leper, a tanner, a sorcerer (who offered money for the gifts of the Holy Ghost, giving rise to the term simony), and the man who carried Jesus's cross to the Crucifixion.

variants.name: Simen
meanings: Usual English form of Simeon , borne in the New Testament by various characters: two apostles, a brother of Jesus, a Pharisee, a leper, a tanner, a sorcerer (who offered money for the gifts of the Holy Ghost, giving rise to the term simony), and the man who carried Jesus's cross to the Crucifixion.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Simon Preston I was born about 1314, in Aberdeenshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, his father, Sir John Preston, was 19 and his mother, Joan Capella, was 19. He married Jonet Sinclair in 1339, in Midlothian, Cook, Illinois, United States. They were the parents of at least 5 sons. He died about 1375, in Craigmillar, Edinburgh, Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 63.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Simon Preston I est né environ 1314, à Aberdeenshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir John Preston, avait 19 ans et sa mère, Joan Capella, avait 19 ans. Il a épousé Jonet Sinclair en 1339, à Midlothian, Cook, Illinois, États-Unis. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils. Il est décédé environ 1375, à Craigmillar, Edinburgh, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 63 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Simon Preston I um 1314 in Aberdeenshire, Schottland, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir John Preston 19 und seine Mutter Joan Capella 19. Er hat 1339 in Midlothian, Cook, Illinois, Vereinigte Staaten Jonet Sinclair geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne. Er starb um 1375 im Alter von 63 Jahren in Craigmillar, Edinburgh, Schottland, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Simon Preston I è nato il circa 1314 nel Aberdeenshire, Scozia, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Sir John Preston, aveva 19 anni e il suo madre, Joan Capella, aveva 19 anni. Lui sposato Jonet Sinclair nel 1339, nel Midlothian, Cook, Illinois, Stati Uniti d'America. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli. Morì circa 1375, nel Craigmillar, Edinburgh, Scozia, Regno Unito, all'età di 63 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Simon Preston Iが約1314年にイギリススコットランドアバーディーンシュアイアで生まれた時，父Sir John Prestonは19歳，母Joan Capellaは19歳であった。1339年にアメリカ合衆国イリノイ州コオクミドロスアンでJonet Sinclairと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子の親であった。彼は約1375年にイギリススコットランドエディンブルグクレイグミラーで63歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Simon Preston I(이)가 대략 1314년 영국 스코틀랜드 압르디실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir John Preston(은)는 19세였고, 그의 어머니 Joan Capella(은)는 19세였다. 그는 1339년 미국 일리노이 주 쿡 미들로스이언에서 Jonet Sinclair(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 대략 1375년 영국 스코틀랜드 에딘버그h 크레이그미라에서 63세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.Farneleis, Midlothia, Scotland: Midlothian, Cook, Ilinóis, Estados Unidos da América
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Simon Preston I nasceu aproximadamente 1314, em Aberdeenshire, Escócia, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir John Preston, tinha 19 anos e sua mãe, Joan Capella, tinha 19 anos. Ele casou-se com Jonet Sinclair em 1339, em Midlothian, Cook, Ilinóis, Estados Unidos da América. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1375, em Craigmillar, Edinburgh, Escócia, United Kingdom, com 63 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Simon Preston I родился около 1314 г. в местности абирдиншир, Шотландия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Sir John Preston было 19 лет, а матери, которую звали Joan Capella, 19. Он женился на женщине по имени Jonet Sinclair в 1339 г. в местности мидлотян, кук, Иллинойс, Соединенные штаты. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей. Он умер около 1375 г. в местности креигмиллар, эдинбург, Шотландия, Великобритания в возрасте 63 лет.

Se casó con Jonet Sinclair en 1339, en Midlothian, Cook, Illinois, Estados Unidos. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos. Murió aproximadamente 1375, en Craigmillar, Edinburgh, Escocia, Reino Unido, a la edad de 63 años.
